# Essentia Wellness Club

> Essentia is a longevity center and social wellness club in Tenerife, Canary Islands, Spain. It combines regenerative medicine, evidence-based wellness protocols, and an exclusive community. Located at Baobab Suites, Costa Adeje. Bookings available online for all services and therapies.

Essentia is not a spa or a gym. It is a precision wellness environment where every protocol is chosen for its measurable effect on biology. Three integrated pillars: Wellness, Medicine, and Community.

- Website: https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com
- Location: Baobab Suites, Costa Adeje, Tenerife, Canary Islands, Spain
- Email: info@essentiawellnessclub.com
- Phone: +34 683 240 986 / +34 633 762 228
- Booking: https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/booking
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/essentiamassage

## Services

- [Contrast Therapy](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/contrast-therapy): Alternating heat and cold (sauna + cold plunge) to activate recovery and reduce inflammation. 60 min · €45.
- [Breathing Sessions](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/breathing-sessions): Guided breathwork (Wim Hof, box breathing, coherence). 45 min · €35. Group and 1:1 sessions available.
- [Red Light Therapy](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/red-light-therapy): Full-body medical-grade panels, red (630–670 nm) + near-infrared (810–850 nm). 20 min · €25.
- [Manual Therapies](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/manual-therapies): 10 precision massage and bodywork treatments, from €90 to €350. 30–120 min.
- [Functional Well-Being](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/wellness/functional-well-being): Longevity-focused movement and strength training, 1:1 or small group. 50 min · €65.
- [Hyperbaric Oxygen](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/medicine/hyperbaric-chambers): 100% pure oxygen at 1.5–3× atmospheric pressure for tissue repair. 60 min · €120.
- [IV Therapy](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/medicine/intravenous-therapy): High-dose Vitamin C, NAD+, Myers Cocktail, Glutathione, custom amino acids. 45–90 min.
- [Regenerative Medicine](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/medicine/regenerative-medicine): PRP therapy, peptide protocols, ozone therapy, longevity assessments.

## Memberships

- [Memberships](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/community/memberships): Three tiers — Essential (€199/mo), Premium (€349/mo), Founder (€699/mo). Monthly billing, 30-day cancellation notice.

## Community

- [Running Club](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/community/running-club): Every Saturday 7:30 AM. Coastal routes through Costa Adeje. All levels welcome. Breakfast included.
- [Education Programs](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/community/education-programs): Monthly masterclasses, workshops, and talks by researchers and longevity practitioners.

## Pages

- [About](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/about): Team, philosophy, and founding story of Essentia.
- [Contact](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/contact): Contact form, address, and directions.
- [Blog](https://www.essentiawellnessclub.com/blog): Articles on longevity, wellness protocols, and community.
